hypothesis: The AMDEN diffusion framework using an EGNN backbone can generate amorphous-material atomic structures that reproduce the structural (RDFs, bond-angle distributions, structure factors) and energetic (potential energy) statistics of MD reference datasets across different thermal histories and multielement compositions, and an energy-based variant with HMC refinement further improves energetic stability and structural fidelity while classifier-free guidance conditioned on Young's modulus enables targeted inverse design.
